# preproduction - qui3tly.cloud

Purpose: unified preproduction hardening and readiness program for Master + Lady, built from:
- Existing project docs and standards
- Existing audit requests (01-13)
- Live deep audit findings (April 2026)

## Structure
- reports/PREPRODUCTION_AUDIT_MERGED.md
  - Deep merged audit report (docs + live state + gaps)
- plans/PREPRODUCTION_EXECUTION_PLAN.md
  - End-to-end implementation roadmap with phases
- todo/PREPRODUCTION_TODO.md
  - Exact execution checklist with priorities and acceptance criteria
- evidence/
  - Command outputs and evidence references used by the report

## Sources merged
- ~/.docs/00-standards/
- ~/.docs/01-architecture/
- ~/.docs/02-operations/
- ~/.docs/06-security/
- ~/personal/audits/01..13 + summaries + outage reports
- ~/projects/qui3tly.cloud/{README.md,PLAN.md,TODO.md,BASELINE/}
- Live system checks (Master + Lady)
